emails.body: I'll check. I remember signing the faxes and signing the originals, but not the return. However, last week was the WEEK FROM HELL, so I easily could have missed it. Kay From: Ben F Jacoby ECT 04/30/2001 07:59 PM Sent by: Ben Jacoby@ECT
